name: project-manager
title: Project Manager
description: Create and manage projects. Configure paths, create projects, list, and archive.
author: shanberg

commands.name: configure
commands.title: Configure Project Manager
commands.description: Set active and archive project paths

commands.name: edit-domains
commands.title: Edit Domains
commands.description: Edit domain codes and labels used for new projects

commands.name: edit-project-structure
commands.title: Edit Project Structure
commands.description: Edit folder names created inside each new project

commands.name: view-project
commands.title: View Project
commands.description: View project tasks and manage tasks

commands.name: archive-project
commands.title: Archive Project
commands.description: Move a project from active to archive

commands.name: unarchive-project
commands.title: Unarchive Project
commands.description: Move a project from archive back to active

commands.name: focused-project
commands.title: Focused Project
commands.description: Show focused project and next task in menu bar

commands.name: focused-project-status
commands.title: Focused task
commands.description: Show focused project progress in menu bar

commands.name: add-focused-todo
commands.title: Add Task
commands.description: Add a task to the focused project

commands.name: add-focused-prior-todo
commands.title: Add Prior Task
commands.description: Add a task before the active task

preferences.name: configPath
preferences.title: Config Path Override
preferences.description: Override pm config location (default: ~/.config/pm). Leave empty to use default.

preferences.name: pmCliPath
preferences.title: pm CLI Path
preferences.description: Full path to pm CLI (e.g. ~/dev/project-manager/dist/cli.js). Leave empty to auto-detect.

preferences.name: obsidianVault
preferences.title: Obsidian Vault (Advanced URI)
preferences.description: Vault name for cursor positioning. Requires Obsidian Advanced URI plugin. Leave empty to use path-only open.

preferences.name: obsidianVaultRoot
preferences.title: Obsidian Vault Root (Advanced URI)
preferences.description: Absolute path to vault root (e.g. ~/Obsidian/Projects). Must contain activePath and archivePath.
